channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Paratus, Powertel switch on Zimbabwe cross-border fibre
item.description: Paratus, Powertel switch on Zimbabwe cross-border fibre — via tech.africa #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Social media influencer ’Mai Clifford’ fined US$200 for drunk driving after telling court he owns only two cows
item.description: Social media influencer ’Mai Clifford’ fined US$200 for drunk driving after telling court he owns only two cows — via NewZimbabwe.com #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewZimbabwe.com

item.title: Constitutional Court to hear challenge to Mnangagwa’s removal of Majome as Human Rights Commission chair
item.description: The Constitutional Court is set to hear a case challenging President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s decision to remove Jessie Majome as chairperson of the Zimbabwe Human Rights Commission (ZHRC) and reassign her to the Public Service Commission (PSC). The application was filed by pro-democracy activist Allan Chipoyi, 26, who argues that Mnangagwa acted outside the Constitution by [...] The post Constitutional Court to hear challenge to Mnangagwa’s removal of Majome as Human Rights Commission chair appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: South African court order extradition of activist Nyokayemabhunu
item.description: Activist Wellington Masiwa, popularly known as ‘Nyokayemabhunu’, has lost his bid to stop his extradition from South Africa after a Randburg magistrate ruled that he can be surrendered to Zimbabwe to serve a sentence linked to a fraud conviction. In a judgment delivered on Monday, the Randburg Magistrate’s Court found that Zimbabwe had met all [...] The post South African court order extradition of activist Nyokayemabhunu appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Sikandar Raza back as Zimbabwe eye Bangladesh T20 Series after ODI triumph
item.description: Zimbabwe’s senior men’s cricket team will be aiming to build on their recent success when they face Bangladesh in the opening match of a three-match T20 International series at Queens Sports Club on Wednesday. The Chevrons head into the contest full of confidence after clinching the One-Day International (ODI) series 2-1 against the same opponents [...] The post Sikandar Raza back as Zimbabwe eye Bangladesh T20 Series after ODI triumph appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Grieving Khumalo Family Sounds Alarm Over Fake GoFundMe Linked To UK Triple Murder
item.description: Family Exposes Heartless GoFundMe Scam After UK Triple Murder Tragedy A grieving family has issued an urgent warning after discovering what they say is a fake GoFundMe campaign claiming to raise money to repatriate British-Zimbabwean woman Nothabo Zandile Tshuma and her two daughters following their deaths in the United Kingdom. The family says they did [...] The post Grieving Khumalo Family Sounds Alarm Over Fake GoFundMe Linked To UK Triple Murder appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: 100,000 return home as minister puts Zimbabweans in SA at over 2 million
item.description: ‘We are hoping 70 percent of that 2 million is coming home and we are ready to receive them’ The post 100,000 return home as minister puts Zimbabweans in SA at over 2 million appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: A passport cannot escape patriarchy: Why some Zimbabwean women are still dying at the hands of men in Britain @nehandaradio
item.description: The Bedfordshire killings have reignited painful questions within Zimbabwe’s diaspora. Gabriel Manyati argues that migration alone cannot erase deeply rooted patriarchal beliefs and calls for greater accountability in preventing violence against women. The post A passport cannot escape patriarchy: Why some Zimbabwean women are still dying at the hands of men in Britain appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Let’s get this straight: the Mutapa Empire was not in Masvingo and ED has no claim to the throne @nehandaradio @TendaiMbofana
item.description: A viral proposal to crown President Emmerson Mnangagwa emperor of a restored Mutapa Empire has sparked debate. Tendai Ruben Mbofana examines the historical record, arguing that the Mutapa Empire, Great Zimbabwe, the Rozvi State and the Ndebele Kingdom are being selectively interpreted to advance a modern political narrative. The post Let’s get this straight: the Mutapa Empire was not in Masvingo and ED has no claim to the throne appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Varun Beverages Emerges as Frontrunner in Bid for Dairibord Control @ZSE_ZW
item.description: HARARE – Indian beverage giant Varun Beverages has emerged as the leading contender to acquire a controlling stake in Zimbabwe Stock Exchange-listed Dairibord Holdings Limited, in what could become one of the country’s most significant corporate transactions in recent years. State media reported that market intelligence points to Varun as the most likely buyer after Dairibord [...] The post Varun Beverages Emerges as Frontrunner in Bid for Dairibord Control appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Why are you angry Thomas Mapfumo chose the money? @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Thomas Mapfumo’s reported decision to accept a US$1 million performance package from businessman Wicknell Chivayo has divided Zimbabweans. Is the Chimurenga legend abandoning his principles, or are critics demanding impossible sacrifices from a man who deserves financial security after decades of service to the nation? The post Why are you angry Thomas Mapfumo chose the money? appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: inDrive launches investigation into alleged driver–passenger incident @bulawayo24
item.description: Ride‐hailing platform inDrive says it has launched an internal investigation into an incident involving one of its drivers and passenger Trueman Chikukwa, following concerns raised after a story recen... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Notorious accident blackspot kills 2 more along Masvingo road, 4 others killed in Kombi and Haulage Truck head-on crash
item.description: Zimbabwe’s Roads: A Deadly Toll as Accidents Mount Harare – The nation of Zimbabwe is once again grappling with the devastating reality of its perilous roads, following a series of horrific accidents that claimed multiple lives in mid-July 2026. These recent tragedies, occurring within days of each other on major highways, underscore a persistent and [...] The post Notorious accident blackspot kills 2 more along Masvingo road, 4 others killed in Kombi and Haulage Truck head-on crash first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mnangagwa’s Zimbabwe is not the Zimbabwe we have always known @bulawayo24
item.description: One of the unforgivable sins committed by Mnangagwa was recalibrating our national discourse. The Zimbabwe of Mnangagwa is not the Zimbabwe we have always known. This one is deeply divided, polarized,... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Thomas Mapfumo’s US$1 million U-Turn: The Real Reason why Mukanya Finally Accepted Wicknell Chivayo’s Cash @wicknellchivayo
item.description: For decades, the name Thomas Mapfumo has been synonymous with the “Chimurenga” spirit — a musical and political resistance that once provided the soundtrack to Zimbabwe’s liberation struggle and, later, its most searing critiques of post-colonial corruption. Known as “Mukanya,” the dreadlocked lion of Zimbabwean music has lived in self-imposed exile in the United States [...] The post Thomas Mapfumo’s US$1 million U-Turn: The Real Reason why Mukanya Finally Accepted Wicknell Chivayo’s Cash first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Whoever Wins, Wins: Ahwina Ahwina: Waba Waba: Wafa Wafa: ED Mnangagwa’s Counter-Revolutionary Proj
item.description: “CA3 is nothing but a brutal order that resembles the law of the jungle, devoid of accountability in governance, politics... Continue reading "Whoever Wins, Wins: Ahwina Ahwina: Waba Waba: Wafa Wafa: ED Mnangagwa’s Counter-Revolutionary Proj" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Chinese Executive in US$3.65 Million Heist, Zimbabwe-based Lithium Mine Crumbles
item.description: The US$3.65 Million Heist: How a Chinese Executive Looted Millions of Cash from a Zimbabwean Lithium Mine HARARE – In the high-stakes world of Zimbabwe’s lithium rush, where the promise of “white gold” has attracted billions in foreign investment, a staggering case of corporate betrayal has laid bare the fragile underbelly of the nation’s most [...] The post Chinese Executive in US$3.65 Million Heist, Zimbabwe-based Lithium Mine Crumbles first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News
